name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Gastro Intestinal Salmon & Anchovy 5kg
shortDescription: It is used in the process of relieving acute and chronic intestinal syndrome and absorption problems and curing diarrhea. It helps in the treatment of stomach problems. It ensures the skin health is restored. Thanks to its beneficial content for the digestive system microbiota, it helps your cat with acute or chronic digestive system problems to regain health. Thanks to its rich and delicious content and nutritional supplements, it meets all the needs of your cat.
description: How it works: Rich in prebiotics and probiotics (heat resistant probiotic stain; Bacillus Amyloliquefaciens) Quality and hydrolyzed protein sources, Dried Algae (Omega-3 and Vitamin Source) Marigold Extract (Anti-inflammatory and Antiseptic) Sea Buckthorn (Omega-7 source and Anti-inflammatory) Helpful content for digestive system microbiota Ingredients: Anchovy Protein, Pea, Hydrolyzed Salmon Protein, Brown Rice, Chicken Oil, Sugar Beet Pulp, Dried Egg, Fish Oil, Natural Flavors, Powdered Cellulose, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Brewer's Yeast, Probiotic, Psyllium Shells, Dried Algae, MOS, -Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Wild Seabuckthorn. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
